calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application For Default Judgment By Court Against Healthypets, Inc And Jimmy Quita
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

George W. Nowel, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff LAW OFFICES OF GEORGE W. NOWELL.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) HEALTHYPETS, INC., AND MIMMY QUITA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff George W. Nowel sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1. Judgment is entered in favor of Plaintiff LAW OFFICES OF GEORGE W. NOWELL and against defendants HEALTHYPETS, INC., and JIMMY QUITA in the total amount of $26,243.02 (inclusive of unpaid, invoiced attorney's fees and costs (of $21,499.02), interest (of $4,299.00 through August 1, 2014) and costs (of $445.00) as set forth in paragraphs 2, 3 and 4. infra..
2. Plaintiff is awarded pre-judgment interest calculated at $179.15 per month (at10% simple interst per Cal Civil Code 3289 (b))on the base claim of $21,499.02 from August 1, 2012 to August 1, 2014 (24 momths) ($179.15 x 24 momths = $(over) $4,299.00).
3. Plaintiff is awarded costs totaling $445.00 (Statutory Cost of Suit $370 and Personal Service of $75).
4. Plaintiff is entitled to an award of attorney's fees in the amount of $21,499.02 pursuant to Cal Code of Civil Procedure Section 1033.5 (a)(10)(A) (and Cal Code of Civil Procedure Section 685.040 included in the judgment hereon as a "costs" of recovery)
5. Plaintiff is therefore awarded judgment in the mount of $26,243.02 on the date of this judgment.
6. Interest shall accrue at the rate of 10% per annum on the amount of the judgment entered until the judgment is paid pursuant to Cal Code Civil Procedure Section 685.010.
7. Plaintiff in entitled to attorney's fees to collect on this judgment pursuant to Cal aoorney-client contract betwee plaintiff and the named defendants.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
